creator: larshenrikoern@outlook.dk
text:
I have a similar failure. My system is FreeBSD 13.1. Pacakges now prebuilt latest. I have deleted all packages and reinstalled (also building with poudriere. But as I said reinstalled. The proplem has persisted for more than a month

Fatal exception: Signal 11
Stack:

Have a nice day
